emailStep.title: Forgot Password?
emailStep.subtitle: No worries! Enter your registered email and we'll send a 6-digit OTP to reset your password.
emailStep.otpmsg: A new code has been sent to your email.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.emailNotFound: Please enter your registered email address
errors.noConnection: No connection. Please check your internet.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.invalid: Invalid OTP code. Please try again.
errors.expired: OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please go back and try again.
errors.tokenInvalid: Session expired. Please go back and try again.
errors.noConnection: No connection. Please check your internet.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

passwordStep.title: Create New Password
passwordStep.subtitle: Almost done! Set a strong new password for your account.
passwordStep.successMessage: 🎉 Your password has been updated successfully. Please sign in with your new password to continue.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
errors.passwordLong: Password must be less than 200 characters
errors.tokenExpired: Your reset session has expired. Please start again.
errors.noConnection: No connection. Please check your internet.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
